nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联1443种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等1443种鸟类。

nodes.name: 夜鹰科
nodes.summary: 夜鹰科（Caprimulgidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联76种鸟类，如Spotted nightjar、Solomons nightjar、Papuan nightjar等76种鸟类。

nodes.name: 坎佩切州
nodes.summary: 坎佩切州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Yucatan poorwill，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Shipstern Conservation & Management Area
nodes.summary: Shipstern Conservation & Management Area是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Yucatan poorwill，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 热带雨林
nodes.summary: 结构复杂且冠层完整的高生物多样性森林。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: 尤卡坦州
nodes.summary: 尤卡坦州是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括眼斑吐綬雞、Yucatan poorwill，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 夜鷹目
nodes.summary: 夜鷹目（Caprimulgiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联83种鸟类，如Spotted nightjar、Solomons nightjar、Papuan nightjar等83种鸟类。

nodes.name: 尤卡坦半岛
nodes.summary: 尤卡坦半岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联8种鸟类，包括Singing quail、眼斑吐綬雞、美洲紅鸛等8种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Yucatan poorwill
nodes.summary: Yucatan poorwill（Yucatan poorwill，学名 Nyctiphrynus yucatanicus），分类上属于夜鷹目，并归入夜鹰科，在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联4个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括热带雨林、灌丛。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in the Yucatán Peninsula of Belize, Guatemala, and Mexico.{{cite web |url=https://www.worldbirdnames.org/ |title=IOC World Bird List (v 11.2) |last1=Gill |first1= F

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In Mexico it occurs in the states of Campeche, Yucatán (except the northern coastal strip), and Quintana Roo

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In Mexico it occurs in the states of Campeche, Yucatán (except the northern coastal strip), and Quintana Roo

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: In the Shipstern Wildlife Reserve area of Belize, the yucatan poorwill has been observed to be inhabiting all year round and is usually found in small groups (less than 10) in specific habitats. In elevation it ranges from sea level to about

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It inhabits a variety of landscapes including the interiors and edges of tropical, humid, and semi-humid forest as well as scrublands. It also appears to be abundant in deciduous forest, but one observation reveals that it is not commonly found in secondary shrubby forests in tropical rainforests. Its habitat is still not well known

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It inhabits a variety of landscapes including the interiors and edges of tropical, humid, and semi-humid forest as well as scrublands. It also appears to be abundant in deciduous forest, but one observation reveals that it is not commonly found in secondary shrubby forests in tropical rainforests. Its habitat is still not well known
